data.body:
We had a wasp nest under our driveway.

Wasp foam didn't work.

I set up the Dyson vacuum at the entrance of the burrow, & started banging a stick and riling them up for about 30 mins.

They made a super satisfying rattling noise as they got sucked up inside. Filled the canister about 25%.
